source_title: 04 Tunnel - Raya and the Last Dragon/09 Substance 3D Library Displacements

evidences.content: 好了，下面我将介绍如何从 Substance Designer 或 Substance Painter 中获取位移效果。 Alright, so I want to go over how to take displacements from Substance Designer or Substance Painter 并将其转化为我们可以在虚幻中使用的图像。 and turn those into images that we can use inside of Unreal. 因此，您可以从头开始创建，也可以从 Adobe Substance 下载任何内容。 So you could create this from scratch or you can download anything off of the Adobe Substance 3D Assets 主页。 3D Assets homepage. 您只需知道，您不必只使用 Quixel 纹理。 Just know that you don't have to exclusively stick to Quixel textures. 事实上，如果你这样做，你的作品就会开始变得和其他人的作品一样。 In fact, if you do, your work will start to end up looking like everyone else's. 因此，要么自己制作材料，要么从其他地方寻找材料，这都是很好的办法。 So it's great to either create your own materials or find them from somewhere else. 但我要先从这块迷宫式的古老拉丝沙漠石材开始，这样我们就能 But I'm going to start off with this labyrinth ancient brushed desert stone material so we 我们可以在洞壁底部看到一些三维形状 can get some of these three-dimensional shapes that we'll see at the bottom of our cave wall 因此，我要下载 SBSAR 文件，然后将其导入 Substance。 So I'm going to download this SBSAR file and now I'm going to bring this into Substance 3D Painter 3D Painter. 因此，在 Substance Painter 中，我们将创建一个新项目。 So in Substance Painter, we'll create a new project. 您可以选择虚幻引擎 4 模板，我已经准备了一个简单的素材 You can pick the Unreal Engine 4 template and I've prepared a simple plain material 其中单个面占据了整个 UV 瓦，我也会将其作为下载内容提供 where the single face takes up the entire UV tile, which I'll also include as a download 请点击下面的链接，以备不时之需。 down below in case you need it. 我们将文档分辨率更改为 4K，因为我们希望进行置换 We'll change our document resolution to 4K because we want our displacements to be done 分辨率越高越好，然后点击 "确定"。 in as high of a resolution as possible and we'll click OK. 现在，我们有了简单的平原。 So now we have our simple plain. 现在，让我们导入纹理。 Now let's import our texture. 点击底部的加号图标，然后点击 "添加资源"。 So click this plus icon on the bottom here and then click Add Resources. 然后导航到我们的.SBSAR 文件。 And then let's navigate to our.SBSAR file. 然后将其导入当前会话。 And then we'll import this into our current session. 现在，我们只需单击并将其拖动到平原上，然后确认 Now we can just click and drag this onto our plain and then we'll just want to verify that 我们有一个高度通道，它将作为我们的位移输出。 we have a height channel, which is what will be exported as our displacement. 现在，我们可以直接进入 "导出纹理"。 Now from here, we can go right to Export Textures. 它会自动选择我们的虚幻 4 输出模板，让我们将其导出为 16 位 It's automatically chosen our Unreal 4 output template and let's export this as a 16-bit 但我们要做的一件事是，转到输出模板，找到我们的 But one thing we'll want to do is we'll want to go over to Output Templates and find our 虚幻引擎 4 契约预设 Unreal Engine 4 Pact preset. 如果你看这里，我们还没有把我们的高度作为位移图。 And if you look here, we haven't included our height as a displacement map. 在这种情况下，我们不需要发射贴图，因此可以将其重命名为 "位移"。 So in this case, we don't need our emissive map, so we can just rename this to Displacement 然后点击并拖动 RGB 框的高度，选择灰色通道。 and then we'll click and drag height over this RGB box and choose gray channel. 现在，我们将正确导出位移。 And now we'll export our displacement properly. 现在，我们可以回到 "设置 "选项卡，然后点击 "导出"。 Now we can go back to our Settings tab and just press Export. 现在点击 "打开输出目录"，我们就可以验证我们是否有位移了 And now if you click Open Output Directory, we can verify that we have our displacement 这里的材料。 material here. 我还打算对我们的陶土砖材料做同样的处理。 I'm also going to go ahead and do the same thing for our terracotta tiles material.
evidences.speaker: instructor
